text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: I can't wait to see Agnes Tachyon!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
She's an oddball, but there seems to be more to
her than meets the eye.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I totally get you. I love the way she runs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The venue is full of Agnes Tachyon's fans!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Clearly, the autumn Tenno Sho isn't hailed as the
definitive medium-distance race for nothing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In contrast to the lively stands, the racecourse is
full of strained tension.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Not in the slightest! Overexcitement is
detrimental to the ability to focus.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'm completely relaxed. But I still want to get the
most out of this opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I feel like I can run really well today.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It took a lot to get all the way here. That's why
I'm not holding anything back!
